steps.name: get_status
steps.summary: Retrieve repository status and expose `git_status` to the workflow context.

steps.name: get_current_branch
steps.summary: Resolve the currently checked out branch name.

steps.name: get_base_branch
steps.summary: Resolve the base branch used by Git workflows.

steps.name: create_commit
steps.summary: Create a commit from context-provided commit message data.

steps.name: push
steps.summary: Push the current branch to the configured remote.

steps.name: ai_generate_commit_message
steps.summary: Generate a commit message from current uncommitted changes using AI.

steps.name: save_current_branch
steps.summary: Store the current branch in workflow context for later restore.

steps.name: restore_original_branch
steps.summary: Return to the branch saved earlier in workflow context.

steps.name: checkout
steps.summary: Checkout a specific branch from workflow context.

steps.name: pull
steps.summary: Update the current branch from the configured remote.

steps.name: create_branch
steps.summary: Create a new branch from workflow-provided branch data.

steps.name: show_uncommitted_diff_summary
steps.summary: Summarize local uncommitted changes for humans and downstream AI steps.

steps.name: show_branch_diff_summary
steps.summary: Summarize branch-level changes relative to the base branch.

steps.name: create_worktree
steps.summary: Create a worktree for isolated branch work.

steps.name: worktree_commit
steps.summary: Create a commit inside a specific worktree.

steps.name: worktree_push
steps.summary: Push a branch from a specific worktree.
